title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, generate, pull, push, list, copy, delete, show, create.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Ollama; same feature parity as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI client for Ollama; no API keys, 100% private, responsive design.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama; offers synchronous/asynchronous APIs and streaming support.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client library for Ollama with async/await and streaming generation support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completion via Ollama.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model in servers/DMs.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot integration for Ollama with group whitelist and streaming responses.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich terminal UI (TUI) for chatting with Ollama models, written in Go.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, adding OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder components.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to invoke Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React.

title: ollama-kotlin
summary: Kotlin multiplatform client for Ollama supporting JVM, Android, and iOS targets.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama HTTP API with GenServer-friendly streaming.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for integrating Ollama into mobile and desktop apps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private local LLM chats.
